Interface LayerDao

public interface LayerDao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Layer entity. Declares CRUD operations for managing drawing layers within projects.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<Integer>
    countByProject(long projectId)
    Gets the count of layers in a specific project.
    int
    delete(Layer layer)
    Deletes a layer from the database.
    int
    delete(Layer... layers)
    Deletes multiple layers from the database.
    long
    insert(Layer layer)
    Inserts a single layer into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Layer... layers)
    Inserts multiple layers into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Collection<Layer> layers)
    Inserts multiple layers into the database.
    LiveData<Layer>
    select(long layerId)
    Retrieves a layer by its ID.
    LiveData<List<Layer>>
    selectByProject(long projectId)
    Retrieves all layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order (Z-index).
    LiveData<List<Layer>>
    selectUnlockedByProject(long projectId)
    Retrieves all unlocked layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order.
    LiveData<List<Layer>>
    selectVisibleByProject(long projectId)
    Retrieves all visible layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order.
    int
    update(Layer layer)
    Updates an existing layer in the database.
    int
    update(Layer... layers)
    Updates multiple existing layers in the database.

    Updates the layer order for a specific layer.
    int
    updateLockedState(long layerId, boolean isLocked)
    Toggles the locked state of a layer.
    int
    updateOpacity(long layerId, float opacity)
    Updates the opacity of a layer.
    int
    updateVisibility(long layerId, boolean isVisible)
    Toggles the visibility of a layer.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(Layer layer)
      Inserts a single layer into the database.
      Parameters:
      layer - Layer instance to insert.
      Returns:
      ID of the newly inserted layer.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Collection<Layer> layers)
      Inserts multiple layers into the database.
      Parameters:
      layers - Collection of layers to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted layers.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Layer... layers)
      Inserts multiple layers into the database.
      Parameters:
      layers - Variable number of layers to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted layers.

    • update

      int update(Layer layer)
      Updates an existing layer in the database.
      Parameters:
      layer - Layer instance with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • update

      int update(Layer... layers)
      Updates multiple existing layers in the database.
      Parameters:
      layers - Variable number of layers with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • delete

      int delete(Layer layer)
      Deletes a layer from the database. Note: Cascades to related pixels.
      Parameters:
      layer - Layer instance to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • delete

      int delete(Layer... layers)
      Deletes multiple layers from the database.
      Parameters:
      layers - Variable number of layers to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • select

      LiveData<Layer> select(long layerId)
      Retrieves a layer by its ID.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the layer, or null if not found.

    • selectByProject

      LiveData<List<Layer>> selectByProject(long projectId)
      Retrieves all layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order (Z-index).
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of layers for the specified project.

    • selectVisibleByProject

      LiveData<List<Layer>> selectVisibleByProject(long projectId)
      Retrieves all visible layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of visible layers for the specified project.

    • selectUnlockedByProject

      LiveData<List<Layer>> selectUnlockedByProject(long projectId)
      Retrieves all unlocked layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of unlocked layers for the specified project.

    • countByProject

      LiveData<Integer> countByProject(long projectId)
      Gets the count of layers in a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the number of layers in the project.

    • updateLayerOrder

      int updateLayerOrder(long layerId, int newOrder)
      Updates the layer order for a specific layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      newOrder - New layer order value.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • updateVisibility

      int updateVisibility(long layerId, boolean isVisible)
      Toggles the visibility of a layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      isVisible - New visibility state.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • updateLockedState

      int updateLockedState(long layerId, boolean isLocked)
      Toggles the locked state of a layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      isLocked - New locked state.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • updateOpacity

      int updateOpacity(long layerId, float opacity)
      Updates the opacity of a layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      opacity - New opacity value (0.0 to 1.0).
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.
